dataset: Yahoo Finance Historical Data (SPY, AAPL, MSFT)

pi_items.source: Data files at /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/ contain real historical data from Yahoo Finance for these three tickers (2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31)

pi_items.verified_value: Unknown - Colors are selectable in NinjaTrader 8 interval linking, but documentation does not enumerate available options
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/linking_windows.htm) confirms interval linking uses colors to group windows, but specific color names are not documented. Web searches indicate users can select from a palette of colors.

NinjaTrader 8 official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/cross_hair.htm) explicitly confirms Global Crosshair is a valid crosshair type that links crosshairs across multiple chart windows

NinjaTrader 8 BarsPeriodType documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/barsperiod.htm) confirms that the Value parameter for minute-based bars represents the interval quantity (e.g., 60 for 60-minute bars)

NinjaTrader 8 official BarsPeriodType documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/barsperiod.htm) lists 'Minute' (value 4) as one of 14 available BarsPeriodType options for time-based bars

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real historical stock data from Yahoo Finance for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT (daily bars from 2023-2024). The Global Crosshair feature is confirmed as a valid NinjaTrader 8 feature for synchronizing cursor positions across charts. The timeframe specification of 60-minute bars uses the standard NinjaTrader period value of 60 and period type of 'Minute'. The expected interval linking color 'Green' cannot be independently verified as the NinjaTrader documentation does not enumerate available color options for interval linking, though the feature itself uses selectable colors to group linked windows.
